mods.name: Boost Controller
mods.description: An electronic boost controller safely increases boost pressure on the factory twin-turbo RB26DETT. Simple and effective power increase with no other mods needed.
mods.partNumbers: GReddy Profec B Spec II, HKS EVC 7
mods.installNotes: Tap into the wastegate solenoid vacuum line. Start at factory boost (10 psi) and raise gradually. Monitor with boost gauge. Stock ceramics safely handle 14 psi.

mods.name: Exhaust System
mods.description: Replace the restrictive factory exhaust with a full turbo-back system for improved flow and the iconic RB26 straight-six turbo sound.
mods.installNotes: Full catback from the downpipe back. 3-inch diameter recommended. Hang on factory mounts. 1.5 hour install on a lift. Combine with downpipe for full benefit.

mods.name: Upgraded Downpipe
mods.description: A larger diameter downpipe eliminates the factory bottleneck right at the turbo outlet for faster spool and more top-end power.
mods.installNotes: Unbolt factory pipe from turbo outlet. Pre-soak bolts with penetrant on older cars. 3-inch stainless recommended. 1 hour on a lift.

mods.name: Upgraded Intercooler
mods.description: The factory side-mount intercoolers are small and heat soak quickly. A front-mount intercooler dramatically reduces intake temps for consistent power.
mods.installNotes: Remove factory side-mount units and piping. Install FMIC behind front bumper. Custom piping runs from turbos to intercooler and back to throttle body. 4+ hour install.

mods.name: Upgraded Fuel System
mods.description: Larger injectors and a higher-flow fuel pump are required to support power beyond 350hp on the RB26DETT. The factory fuel system is the first bottleneck.
mods.installNotes: Swap injectors at the fuel rail — 6 total. Drop fuel tank to replace pump. Requires ECU retune to match new injector flow rates. Essential upgrade before raising boost.

mods.name: Aftermarket ECU
mods.description: The factory ECU runs out of tuning headroom quickly. A standalone ECU provides full control for serious RB26 builds beyond 400hp.
mods.partNumbers: Link G4X PlugIn ECU RB26, Haltech Elite 2500 + PnP adapter
mods.installNotes: Plug-in ECUs are easiest — direct replacement for factory unit. Requires professional dyno tune for all load points. Configure boost control, fuel, ignition, ATTESA control. 8+ hours for install and base tune.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbochargers
mods.description: Replace the factory ceramic-wheel T28 turbos with steel-wheel or upgraded ball-bearing turbos for significantly higher power potential and boost response.
mods.installNotes: Requires removal of factory turbos from the exhaust manifold. Bolt-on replacements use the stock manifold. Oil and water feed lines must be transferred. Retune required. 10+ hour job.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers modernize the R32's suspension with precise ride height and damping control, essential for getting the ATTESA AWD system to work optimally.
mods.partNumbers: HKS Hipermax IV GT 80230-AN006, Ohlins Road & Track
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. The ATTESA system benefits from proper suspension setup. Set ride height evenly to maintain AWD balance. Alignment critical.
